patches.hypothesis: The refined patch addresses overfitting by using a more robust algorithm to handle general cases, avoiding hardcoded values, and including proper edge case handling. The root cause of the overfitting is due to the patch's reliance on hardcoded values and logic only handling test inputs. The refined patch uses a more robust algorithm that can handle a wider range of inputs and avoids hardcoded values by calculating them dynamically. The patch also includes additional test cases to cover edge cases not covered by the original tests.
